events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Zuckerberg San Francisco General for client 1098. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: renal, cardiovascular. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 500 mg/meal, carbs 45–75 g/meal. Prefers American; dislikes lentils. Cooking ability: microwave. 10 meals/week, zone Mission.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Grilled Chicken Garden Salad
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 39 g outside 45–75 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Baked Salmon with Quinoa
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 40 g outside 45–75 g range.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/500 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/500 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 364/500 mg ✓, carbs 49 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Batch allocated: Low-Sodium Chicken Adobo with Rice
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B1 (80 servings, 9 labor hours on 2026-07-20).

events.title: Donation D001 feeds batch B1
events.detail: Jasmine Rice (50 lb sacks) from Golden State Rice Cooperative — triaged as kitchen ingredient.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1098 added to route R-MISS-1 (Mission), delivery 2026-07-21, window 14:00–16:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1098: 10 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 1. 0 hard-constraint violations.
